Title: Request payment channel capabilities
Content:
Once your account has passed verification and the Account Holder verification status is PASSED, you can start requesting capabilities for your Accounts. You will be notified via webhook when the verification for your sub-account is successful.

To do this, you will need to use the Update Account Holder endpoint and input the capability’s type and channel_code.

Country

Type

Channel Codes

Philippines

MONEY_IN

PH_CARDS, GCASH

Thailand

MONEY_IN

TH_CARDS

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
    "capabilities": [
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "GCASH"
        },
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
        }
    ]
}

If all requirements for the payment channels are already present in your Account Holder object, the verification process will begin. We will send you a webhook once there is a status update on the capabilities request.

Requirements for PH cards

There are additional requirements for PH_CARDS in the example below, regardless of what is chosen for can_accept_usd or can_accept_recurring:

  • Tax identification number of each individual is required

  • A minimum of 1 Incorporator and 1 PIC is required for individual_details (`type` and role parameters)

  • An address object is required for each individual_details

Below is a sample request payload to request a Cards capability for a a Philippines corporation merchant

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
   "business_detail": {
       "can_accept_usd": true,
       "can_accept_recurring": true,
       "projected_monthly_transaction_count": 10,
       "average_monthly_basket_size": 10,
       "tax_identification_number": "123456789"
   },
   "individual_details": [
       {
           "given_names": "test",
           "surname": "test",
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "email": "mail@domain.co",
           "nationality": "PH",
           "place_of_birth": "PH",
           "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02",
           "gender": "MALE",
           "address": {
               "country": "PH",
               "district": "Quezon City",
               "sub_district": "U.P. campus",
               "street_line1": "incorporator street line 1",
               "street_line2": "incorporator street line 2",
               "city": "Manila",
               "province_state": "Metro Manila",
               "postal_code": "12345"
           },
           "tax_identification_number": "12345678",
           "type": "INCORPORATOR",
           "role": "owner"
       },
       {
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "type": "PIC",
           "role": "contact person"
       }
   ],
   "capabilities": [{
       "type": "MONEY_IN",
       "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
   }]
}

Title: Request kapabilitas channel pembayaran
Content:
Setelah akun Anda berhasil diverifikasi dan status verifikasi Account Holder adalah PASSED, Anda dapat mulai request kapabilitas channel untuk Akun Anda. Anda akan menerima notifikasi via webhook ketika verifikasi untuk sub-akun Anda berhasil.

Untuk melakukan ini, Anda harus menggunakan endpoint Update Account Holder dan memasukkan type dan channel_code untuk kapabilitas teresebut.

Negara

Jenis

Kode channel

Filipina

MONEY_IN

PH_CARDS, GCASH

Thailand

MONEY_IN

TH_CARDS

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
    "capabilities": [
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "GCASH"
        },
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
        }
    ]
}

Jika semua persyaratan untuk channel pembayaran sudah ada di objek Account Holder Anda, proses verifikasi akan dimulai. Kami akan mengirimkan webhook kepada Anda setelah ada pembaruan status pada request kapabilitas.

Persyaratan tambahan untuk kartu Filipina dengan penerimaan USD

Ada persyaratan tambahan untuk PH_CARDS penerimaan USD dalam contoh di bawah ini:

  • Nomor identifikasi pajak setiap individu diperlukan

  • Minimal 1 Incorporator dan 1 PIC diperlukan untuk individual_details ('jenis' dan role parameter)

  • Objek alamat diperlukan untuk setiap individual_details

Di bawah ini adalah contoh request payload untuk meminta kapabilitas Cards untuk merchant corporation Filipina.

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
   "business_detail": {
       "can_accept_usd": true,
       "can_accept_recurring": true,
       "projected_monthly_transaction_count": 10,
       "average_monthly_basket_size": 10,
       "tax_identification_number": "121212"
   },
   "individual_details": [
       {
           "given_names": "test",
           "surname": "test",
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "email": "ali+ph+test@xendit.co",
           "nationality": "PH",
           "place_of_birth": "PH",
           "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02T19:00:00.000Z",
           "gender": "MALE",
           "address": {
               "country": "PH",
               "district": "incorporator district",
               "sub_district": "incorporator sub district",
               "street_line1": "incorporator street line 1",
               "street_line2": "incorporator street line 2",
               "city": "incorporator city",
               "province_state": "incorporator province state",
               "postal_code": "incorporator postal code"
           },
           "tax_identification_number": "12345678",
           "type": "INCORPORATOR",
           "role": "owner"
       },
       {
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "type": "PIC",
           "role": "contact person"
       }
   ],
   "capabilities": [{
       "type": "MONEY_IN",
       "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
   }]
}

Title: ขอความสามารถช่องทางการชำระเงิน
Content:
เมื่อบัญชีของคุณผ่านการยืนยันและสถานะการยืนยัน Account Holder เป็น PASSED แล้ว คุณสามารถเริ่มร้องขอ capabilities สำหรับ Accounts ของคุณได้ คุณจะได้รับการ แจ้งเตือนผ่าน webhook เมื่อการยืนยันสำหรับ sub-account ของคุณสำเร็จ

ในการดำเนินการนี้ คุณจะต้องใช้ endpoint Update Account Holder และป้อน type และ channel_code ของ capability

ประเทศ

Type

Channel Codes

ฟิลิปปินส์

MONEY_IN

PH_CARDS, GCASH

ไทย

MONEY_IN

TH_CARDS

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
    "capabilities": [
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "GCASH"
        },
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
        }
    ]
}

หากข้อกำหนดทั้งหมดสำหรับช่องทางการชำระเงินมีอยู่ใน Account Holder object ของคุณแล้ว กระบวนการยืนยันจะเริ่มต้นขึ้น เราจะส่ง webhook ให้คุณเมื่อมีการอัปเดตสถานะของการร้องขอ capabilities

ข้อกำหนดเพิ่มเติมสำหรับบัตรฟิลิปปินส์ที่รับ USD

มีข้อกำหนดเพิ่มเติมสำหรับ PH_CARDS ที่รับ USD ตามตัวอย่างด้านล่าง:

  • ต้องระบุหมายเลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษีของแต่ละบุคคล

  • ต้องมี Incorporator อย่างน้อย 1 คน และ PIC 1 คนสำหรับ individual_details (พารามิเตอร์ `type` และ role)

  • ต้องมี address object สำหรับ individual_details แต่ละรายการ

ด้านล่างนี้คือตัวอย่าง request payload เพื่อร้องขอ capability Cards สำหรับร้านค้าที่เป็นบริษัทในฟิลิปปินส์

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
   "business_detail": {
       "can_accept_usd": true,
       "can_accept_recurring": true,
       "projected_monthly_transaction_count": 10,
       "average_monthly_basket_size": 10,
       "tax_identification_number": "121212"
   },
   "individual_details": [
       {
           "given_names": "test",
           "surname": "test",
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "email": "ali+ph+test@xendit.co",
           "nationality": "PH",
           "place_of_birth": "PH",
           "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02T19:00:00.000Z",
           "gender": "MALE",
           "address": {
               "country": "PH",
               "district": "incorporator district",
               "sub_district": "incorporator sub district",
               "street_line1": "incorporator street line 1",
               "street_line2": "incorporator street line 2",
               "city": "incorporator city",
               "province_state": "incorporator province state",
               "postal_code": "incorporator postal code"
           },
           "tax_identification_number": "12345678",
           "type": "INCORPORATOR",
           "role": "owner"
       },
       {
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "type": "PIC",
           "role": "contact person"
       }
   ],
   "capabilities": [{
       "type": "MONEY_IN",
       "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
   }]
}
SeoTitle: ขอความสามารถช่องทางการชำระเงิน

Title: Solicitar capacidades del canal de pago
Content:
Una vez que su cuenta haya pasado la verificación y el estado de verificación del Account Holder sea PASSED, usted puede comenzar a solicitar capacidades para sus Cuentas. Se le notificará a través de webhook cuando la verificación de su sub-cuenta sea exitosa.

Para hacer esto, usted necesitará usar el endpoint Update Account Holder e ingresar el type y el channel_code de la capacidad.

País

Type

Códigos de Canal

Filipinas

MONEY_IN

PH_CARDS, GCASH

Tailandia

MONEY_IN

TH_CARDS

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
    "capabilities": [
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "GCASH"
        },
        {
            "type": "MONEY_IN",
            "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
        }
    ]
}

Si todos los requerimientos para los canales de pago ya están presentes en su object Account Holder, el proceso de verificación comenzará. Le enviaremos un webhook una vez que haya una actualización de estado en la solicitud de capacidades.

Requerimientos para PH cards

Existen requerimientos adicionales para PH_CARDS en el ejemplo a continuación, independientemente de lo que se elija para can_accept_usd o can_accept_recurring:

  • Se requiere el número de identificación fiscal de cada individuo

  • Se requiere un mínimo de 1 Incorporator y 1 PIC para individual_details (parámetros type y role)

  • Se requiere un object address para cada individual_details

A continuación, se muestra un payload de request de ejemplo para solicitar una capacidad Cards para un comercio corporativo de Filipinas

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{{account-holder-id}}
{
   "business_detail": {
       "can_accept_usd": true,
       "can_accept_recurring": true,
       "projected_monthly_transaction_count": 10,
       "average_monthly_basket_size": 10,
       "tax_identification_number": "123456789"
   },
   "individual_details": [
       {
           "given_names": "test",
           "surname": "test",
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "email": "mail@domain.co",
           "nationality": "PH",
           "place_of_birth": "PH",
           "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02",
           "gender": "MALE",
           "address": {
               "country": "PH",
               "district": "Quezon City",
               "sub_district": "U.P. campus",
               "street_line1": "incorporator street line 1",
               "street_line2": "incorporator street line 2",
               "city": "Manila",
               "province_state": "Metro Manila",
               "postal_code": "12345"
           },
           "tax_identification_number": "12345678",
           "type": "INCORPORATOR",
           "role": "owner"
       },
       {
           "phone_number": "+639191234567",
           "type": "PIC",
           "role": "contact person"
       }
   ],
   "capabilities": [{
       "type": "MONEY_IN",
       "channel_code": "PH_CARDS"
   }]
}
SeoTitle: Solicitar capacidades del canal de pago
